changelog: TV Home D-pad navigation fix — pressing LEFT from a non-leftmost card now correctly moves to the previous card instead of opening the side rail. The rail only opens when LEFT is pressed at the leftmost card of a row. Intra-grid LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN navigation works exactly like the Movies/Series catalogue. Implemented by manually attempting focusManager.moveFocus(Left) inside a focusGroup-bounded scope, and only redirecting to the rail when no card-target was found.
